https://www.touringcartimes.com/2017/12/07/three-races-per-weekend-confirmed-2018-wtcr/

Each race weekend will start with two 30-minute Free Practice sessions, followed by 30 minutes of qualifying and Race 1.

The second day features a second qualifying session with Q1 of 25 minutes, Q2 of 10 minutes and Q3 with a top-five shootout, followed by Race 2 and Race 3.

Different points will be awarded for each race according to the following scale:

Race 1:
27-20-17-14-12-10-8-6-4-2
Race 2:
25-18-15-12-10-8-6-4-2-1
Race 3:
30-23-19-16-13-10-7-4-2-1

The first race will have a grid according to the first qualifying session and the second race will have a reversed grid with the top ten positions from Q2 while the grid of the third race will be determined as per the combined order after Q3.

兩節各30分鐘練習
然後30分鐘Q1排位，Race 1跟Q1順排
之後10分鐘Q2，Race 2前十跟Q2反排
Q3由Q2前五各自出嚟做一次時間，Race 3跟Q2+Q3順排
